case_title: GABRIELLA REMIGI VS. SOPHIA GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REMIGI, GABRIELLA AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SOPHIA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SOPHIA
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF REMIGI, GABRIELLA ON DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SOPHIA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SOPHIA
